title: Undying Archery
description: Matches the bow's color pallet to the crossbow and improves the wings on the totem of undying.
body: I dislike the look of the vanilla totems of undying and bows, so I made small changes to them. The goal of this pack is to stay close to the vanilla style. So, bows now have a color pallet closer to that of the crossbow and totems of undying have larger wings.
